title: paul russells E27 Edison Screw LED Filament – 7Watt 60W Equivalent 806LM Lumens 2700K ES Standard GLS A60 – Super Bright Energy Saving Light Non-Dimmable - Warm White Bulbs - Pack of 2

[Bright & Comfortable] paul russells 7W LED Filament Bulb provides 806 luminous fluxes, with less than a blink time to warm up to full brightness. The light will be bright and comfortable for you without flickering.

[Visual Impact] High colour rendering (CRI > 80) provides vivid and natural smooth colour; Beam angle of 330 degrees provides a Wide Visual. (Images are for illustration purpose only).
description: Product Description Key Features Comforting Chandelier Warm White Glow Wide Beam Angle Always Free from Flicker paul russells Edison Screw Cap Light bulbs, Warm White Specification Highlights These LED Filament GLS ES/E27 cap bulbs boast a powerful 806 lumens of bright light, with a mercury-free make that makes them safe for home-usage. These are a perfect choice for thoroughly brightening up your home. Instant Ignition With these bulbs lighting up in less than 0.5 seconds, your house will be illuminated in the blink of an eye (quite literally!).
